# Product Impact — llms.txt
# https://llmstxt.org/

> Product Impact is an AI product strategy publication and podcast covering how AI products create value, scale adoption, and measure impact.

## About
- Product Impact publishes news, analysis, case studies, and features about AI product strategy, enterprise adoption, and the people building AI products.
- The Product Impact Podcast features interviews with product leaders, AI strategists, and technology executives.
- Hosted by Arpy Dragffy (PH1 Research) and Brittany Hobbs.

## Content
- News and analysis: [/news](/news)
- Podcast episodes: [/podcast](/podcast)
- Themes: [/themes](/themes)
- Partnerships: [/partnerships](/partnerships)

## Themes
- AI Product Strategy
- Agents & Agentic Systems
- UX for AI
- Adoption & Organizational Change
- Evaluation & Benchmarking
- Go-to-Market & Distribution
- Data, Semantics & Knowledge Foundations
- AI Ethics & Governance

## Contact
- Email: hello@productimpactpodcast.com
- Website: https://productimpactpod.com
